topic: Empty hangers in a closet swing as if coats were just lifted away.
title: The Empty Hangers In My Closet Swing By Themselves | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The empty hangers in my closet swing as if someone just lifted a coat away.
scenes.image_prompt: a row of empty wire hangers on a closet rod, slightly tilted, dim closet light, deep shadow, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My bedroom closet is narrow, with a single bare bulb.
scenes.image_prompt: a narrow closet with a single hanging bulb, clothes pushed to one side, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I close the door fully every night.
scenes.image_prompt: a closet door pulled shut in a dark bedroom, faint light at the seam, shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One morning three empty hangers were still gently swaying.
scenes.image_prompt: three empty hangers caught mid swing, motion blur, dim closet, vertical 9:16 framing
a sealed window with heavy curtains in a still dark room, no movement, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The next night I counted my coats before bed.
scenes.image_prompt: a hand counting coats on a closet rod, warm lamp light, long shadows, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By dawn, one coat was gone and its hanger swung alone.
scenes.image_prompt: a single empty hanger swinging beside hung coats, dim closet, grain, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning another coat vanished. The swinging always pointed toward the door.
scenes.image_prompt: empty hangers all tilted in the same direction toward an open closet door, shadow beyond, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: So I sat up all night and watched the closet.
scenes.image_prompt: a person sitting in a dark bedroom facing a closet, back to camera, faint light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At three, the hangers swung hard, and the closet smelled of cold outside air.
scenes.image_prompt: a closet doorway with hangers swinging violently, faint fog spilling out, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Every coat I own is gone now.
scenes.image_prompt: an empty closet rod with only bare swinging hangers, dim bulb, long shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night a coat I have never seen was hanging there instead.
scenes.image_prompt: a single unfamiliar dark coat hanging alone in an empty closet, low light, fog, vertical 9:16 framing
